mapper.insert: /* ProductMapper.saveProduct */ INSERT INTO PRODUCT (USR_SN, CAT_SN, PRD_NM, PRD_CN, PRD_STATUS_CD, PRD_START_AMT, PRD_IBY_AMT, PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD, PRD_USE_YN, PRD_REG_ID, PRD_UPDT_ID) VALUES (#{usrSn}, #{catSn}, #{prdNm}, #{prdCn}, #{prdStatusCd}, #{prdStartAmt}, #{prdIbyAmt}, #{prdTrdMethodCd}, 'Y', #{prdRegId}, #{prdUpdtId})
mapper.select: /* ProductMapper.findProductById */ SELECT p.PRD_SN, p.USR_SN, p.CAT_SN, c.CAT_NM, p.PRD_NM, p.PRD_CN, p.PRD_STATUS_CD, p.PRD_START_AMT, p.PRD_IBY_AMT, p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD, p.PRD_REG_DT, p.PRD_UPDT_DT, f.FL_PATH AS PRD_IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT p JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN = p.CAT_SN LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN AND pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN WHERE p.PRD_SN = #{prdSn} AND p.PRD_USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PRD_STATUS_CD != 'PRDC0004'

/* ProductMapper.findMyProducts */ SELECT p.PRD_SN, p.USR_SN, p.CAT_SN, c.CAT_NM, p.PRD_NM, p.PRD_CN, p.PRD_STATUS_CD, p.PRD_START_AMT, p.PRD_IBY_AMT, p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD, p.PRD_REG_DT, p.PRD_UPDT_DT, f.FL_PATH AS PRD_IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT p JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN = p.CAT_SN LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_IMAGE pi ON pi.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN AND pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN LEFT JOIN AUCTION a ON a.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN TRADE t ON t.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' WHERE p.USR_SN = #{usrSn} AND p.PRD_USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PRD_STATUS_CD != 'PRDC0004'
AND p.PRD_STATUS_CD = 'PRDC0001'
AND p.PRD_STATUS_CD = 'PRDC0002'
AND a.AUC_STATUS_CD = 'AUCC0003' AND t.TRD_SN IS NULL
AND t.TRD_STATUS_CD IN ('TRDC0003', 'TRDC0004', 'TRDC0005')
AND t.TRD_STATUS_CD = 'TRDC0006'
AND a.AUC_STATUS_CD IN ('AUCC0005', 'AUCC0006')
AND a.AUC_STATUS_CD = 'AUCC0004'
ORDER BY p.PRD_REG_DT DESC
